    Basic properties of the manifold Fréchet derivative #

    In this file, we show various properties of the manifold Fréchet derivative, mimicking the API for Fréchet derivatives.

    • basic properties of unique differentiability sets
    • various general lemmas about the manifold Fréchet derivative
    • deducing differentiability from smoothness,
    • deriving continuity from differentiability on manifolds,
    • congruence lemmas for derivatives on manifolds
    • composition lemmas and the chain rule

    Unique differentiability sets in manifolds #

    source
    theorem uniqueMDiffWithinAt_univ {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] (I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H) {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {x : M} :
    UniqueMDiffAt[Set.univ] x
    source
    theorem uniqueMDiffWithinAt_iff_inter_range {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {s : Set M} {x : M} :
    UniqueMDiffAt[s] x ↔ UniqueDiffWithinAt 𝕜 (↑(extChartAt I x).symm ⁻¹' s ∩ Set.range ↑I) (↑(extChartAt I x) x)
    source
    theorem uniqueMDiffWithinAt_iff {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {s : Set M} {x : M} :
    UniqueMDiffAt[s] x ↔ UniqueDiffWithinAt 𝕜 (↑(extChartAt I x).symm ⁻¹' s ∩ (extChartAt I x).target) (↑(extChartAt I x) x)
    source
    theorem UniqueMDiffWithinAt.mono_nhds {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {s t : Set M} {x : M} (hs : UniqueMDiffAt[s] x) (ht : nhdsWithin x s ≤ nhdsWithin x t) :
    UniqueMDiffAt[t] x
    source
    theorem UniqueMDiffWithinAt.mono_of_mem_nhdsWithin {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {s t : Set M} {x : M} (hs : UniqueMDiffAt[s] x) (ht : t ∈ nhdsWithin x s) :
    UniqueMDiffAt[t] x
    source
    theorem UniqueMDiffWithinAt.mono {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {x : M} {s t : Set M} (h : UniqueMDiffAt[s] x) (st : s ⊆ t) :
    UniqueMDiffAt[t] x
    source
    theorem UniqueMDiffWithinAt.inter' {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {x : M} {s t : Set M} (hs : UniqueMDiffAt[s] x) (ht : t ∈ nhdsWithin x s) :
    UniqueMDiffAt[s ∩ t] x
    source
    theorem UniqueMDiffWithinAt.inter {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {x : M} {s t : Set M} (hs : UniqueMDiffAt[s] x) (ht : t ∈ nhds x) :
    UniqueMDiffAt[s ∩ t] x
    source
    theorem IsOpen.uniqueMDiffWithinAt {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {x : M} {s : Set M} (hs : IsOpen s) (xs : x ∈ s) :
    UniqueMDiffAt[s] x
    source
    theorem UniqueMDiffOn.inter {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {s t : Set M} (hs : UniqueMDiff[s]) (ht : IsOpen t) :
    UniqueMDiff[s ∩ t]
    source
    theorem IsOpen.uniqueMDiffOn {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {s : Set M} (hs : IsOpen s) :
    UniqueMDiff[s]
    source
    theorem uniqueMDiffOn_univ {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] :
    UniqueMDiff[Set.univ]
    source
    theorem UniqueMDiffWithinAt.prod {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {x : M} {y : M'} {s : Set M} {t : Set M'} (hs : UniqueMDiffAt[s] x) (ht : UniqueMDiffAt[t] y) :
    UniqueMDiffAt[s ×ˢ t] (x, y)
    source
    theorem UniqueMDiffOn.prod {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {s : Set M} {t : Set M'} (hs : UniqueMDiff[s]) (ht : UniqueMDiff[t]) :
    UniqueMDiff[s ×ˢ t]
    source
    theorem MDifferentiableWithinAt.mono {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} {s t : Set M} (hst : s ⊆ t) (h : MDiffAt[t] f x) :
    MDiffAt[s] f x
    source
    theorem mdifferentiableWithinAt_univ {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} :
    MDiffAt[Set.univ] f x ↔ MDiffAt f x
    source
    theorem mdifferentiableWithinAt_inter {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} {s t : Set M} (ht : t ∈ nhds x) :
    MDiffAt[s ∩ t] f x ↔ MDiffAt[s] f x
    source
    theorem mdifferentiableWithinAt_inter' {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} {s t : Set M} (ht : t ∈ nhdsWithin x s) :
    MDiffAt[s ∩ t] f x ↔ MDiffAt[s] f x
    source
    theorem MDifferentiableAt.mdifferentiableWithinAt {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} {s : Set M} (h : MDiffAt f x) :
    MDiffAt[s] f x
    source
    theorem MDifferentiableWithinAt.mdifferentiableAt {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} {s : Set M} (h : MDiffAt[s] f x) (hs : s ∈ nhds x) :
    MDiffAt f x
    source
    theorem MDifferentiableOn.mono {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {s t : Set M} (h : MDiff[t] f) (st : s ⊆ t) :
    MDiff[s] f
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem mdifferentiableOn_empty {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} :
    MDiff[∅] f
    source
    theorem mdifferentiableOn_univ {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} :
    MDiff[Set.univ] f ↔ MDiff f
    source
    theorem MDifferentiableOn.mdifferentiableAt {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} {s : Set M} (h : MDiff[s] f) (hx : s ∈ nhds x) :
    MDiffAt f x
    source
    theorem MDifferentiable.mdifferentiableOn {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {s : Set M} (h : MDiff f) :
    MDiff[s] f
    source
    theorem mdifferentiableOn_of_locally_mdifferentiableOn {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {s : Set M} (h : ∀ x ∈ s, ∃ (u : Set M), IsOpen u ∧ x ∈ u ∧ MDiff[s ∩ u] f) :
    MDiff[s] f
    source
    theorem MDifferentiable.mdifferentiableAt {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} (hf : MDiff f) :
    MDiffAt f x

    Relating differentiability in a manifold and differentiability in the model space #

    through extended charts

    source
    theorem mdifferentiableWithinAt_iff_target_inter {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {s : Set M} {x : M} :
    MDiffAt[s] f x ↔ ContinuousWithinAt f s x ∧ DifferentiableWithinAt 𝕜 (writtenInExtChartAt I I' x f) ((extChartAt I x).target ∩ ↑(extChartAt I x).symm ⁻¹' s) (↑(extChartAt I x) x)
    source
    theorem mdifferentiableWithinAt_iff {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} {s : Set M} :
    MDiffAt[s] f x ↔ ContinuousWithinAt f s x ∧ DifferentiableWithinAt 𝕜 (↑(extChartAt I' (f x)) ∘ f ∘ ↑(extChartAt I x).symm) (↑(extChartAt I x).symm ⁻¹' s ∩ Set.range ↑I) (↑(extChartAt I x) x)

    One can reformulate smoothness within a set at a point as continuity within this set at this point, and smoothness in the corresponding extended chart.

    source
    theorem mdifferentiableWithinAt_iff_target_inter' {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} {s : Set M} :
    MDiffAt[s] f x ↔ ContinuousWithinAt f s x ∧ DifferentiableWithinAt 𝕜 (↑(extChartAt I' (f x)) ∘ f ∘ ↑(extChartAt I x).symm) ((extChartAt I x).target ∩ ↑(extChartAt I x).symm ⁻¹' (s ∩ f ⁻¹' (extChartAt I' (f x)).source)) (↑(extChartAt I x) x)

    One can reformulate smoothness within a set at a point as continuity within this set at this point, and smoothness in the corresponding extended chart. This form states smoothness of f written in such a way that the set is restricted to lie within the domain/codomain of the corresponding charts. Even though this expression is more complicated than the one in mdifferentiableWithinAt_iff, it is a smaller set, but their germs at extChartAt I x x are equal. It is sometimes useful to rewrite using this in the goal.

    source
    theorem mdifferentiableWithinAt_iff_target {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} {s : Set M} :
    MDiffAt[s] f x ↔ ContinuousWithinAt f s x ∧ MDiffAt[s] (↑(extChartAt I' (f x)) ∘ f) x

    One can reformulate smoothness within a set at a point as continuity within this set at this point, and smoothness in the corresponding extended chart in the target.

    source
    theorem mdifferentiableAt_iff_target {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} :
    MDiffAt f x ↔ ContinuousAt f x ∧ MDiffAt (↑(extChartAt I' (f x)) ∘ f) x
    source
    theorem mdifferentiableWithinAt_iff_source_of_mem_maximalAtlas {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} {s : Set M} {e : OpenPartialHomeomorph M H} (he : e ∈ IsManifold.maximalAtlas I 1 M) (hx : x ∈ e.source) :
    MDiffAt[s] f x ↔ MDiffAt[↑(e.extend I).symm ⁻¹' s ∩ Set.range ↑I] (f ∘ ↑(e.extend I).symm) (↑(e.extend I) x)
    source
    theorem mdifferentiableWithinAt_iff_source_of_mem_source {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} {s : Set M} [IsManifold I 1 M] {x' : M} (hx' : x' ∈ (chartAt H x).source) :
    MDiffAt[s] f x' ↔ MDiffAt[↑(extChartAt I x).symm ⁻¹' s ∩ Set.range ↑I] (f ∘ ↑(extChartAt I x).symm) (↑(extChartAt I x) x')
    source
    theorem mdifferentiableAt_iff_source_of_mem_source {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} [IsManifold I 1 M] {x' : M} (hx' : x' ∈ (chartAt H x).source) :
    MDiffAt f x' ↔ MDiffAt[Set.range ↑I] (f ∘ ↑(extChartAt I x).symm) (↑(extChartAt I x) x')
    source
    theorem mdifferentiableWithinAt_iff_target_of_mem_source {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {s : Set M} [IsManifold I' 1 M'] {x : M} {y : M'} (hy : f x ∈ (chartAt H' y).source) :
    MDiffAt[s] f x ↔ ContinuousWithinAt f s x ∧ MDiffAt[s] (↑(extChartAt I' y) ∘ f) x
    source
    theorem mdifferentiableAt_iff_target_of_mem_source {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} [IsManifold I' 1 M'] {x : M} {y : M'} (hy : f x ∈ (chartAt H' y).source) :
    MDiffAt f x ↔ ContinuousAt f x ∧ MDiffAt (↑(extChartAt I' y) ∘ f) x
    source
    theorem mdifferentiableWithinAt_iff_of_mem_maximalAtlas {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {s : Set M} {e : OpenPartialHomeomorph M H} {e' : OpenPartialHomeomorph M' H'} {x : M} (he : e ∈ IsManifold.maximalAtlas I 1 M) (he' : e' ∈ IsManifold.maximalAtlas I' 1 M') (hx : x ∈ e.source) (hy : f x ∈ e'.source) :
    MDiffAt[s] f x ↔ ContinuousWithinAt f s x ∧ DifferentiableWithinAt 𝕜 (↑(e'.extend I') ∘ f ∘ ↑(e.extend I).symm) (↑(e.extend I).symm ⁻¹' s ∩ Set.range ↑I) (↑(e.extend I) x)
    source
    theorem mdifferentiableWithinAt_iff_image {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {s : Set M} {e : OpenPartialHomeomorph M H} {e' : OpenPartialHomeomorph M' H'} {x : M} (he : e ∈ IsManifold.maximalAtlas I 1 M) (he' : e' ∈ IsManifold.maximalAtlas I' 1 M') (hs : s ⊆ e.source) (hx : x ∈ e.source) (hy : f x ∈ e'.source) :
    MDiffAt[s] f x ↔ ContinuousWithinAt f s x ∧ DifferentiableWithinAt 𝕜 (↑(e'.extend I') ∘ f ∘ ↑(e.extend I).symm) (↑(e.extend I) '' s) (↑(e.extend I) x)

    An alternative formulation of mdifferentiableWithinAt_iff_of_mem_maximalAtlas if the set if s lies in e.source.

    source
    theorem mdifferentiableWithinAt_iff_of_mem_source {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} {s : Set M} [IsManifold I 1 M] [IsManifold I' 1 M'] {x' : M} {y : M'} (hx : x' ∈ (chartAt H x).source) (hy : f x' ∈ (chartAt H' y).source) :
    MDiffAt[s] f x' ↔ ContinuousWithinAt f s x' ∧ DifferentiableWithinAt 𝕜 (↑(extChartAt I' y) ∘ f ∘ ↑(extChartAt I x).symm) (↑(extChartAt I x).symm ⁻¹' s ∩ Set.range ↑I) (↑(extChartAt I x) x')

    One can reformulate smoothness within a set at a point as continuity within this set at this point, and smoothness in any chart containing that point.

    source
    theorem mdifferentiableWithinAt_iff_of_mem_source' {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} {s : Set M} [IsManifold I 1 M] [IsManifold I' 1 M'] {x' : M} {y : M'} (hx : x' ∈ (chartAt H x).source) (hy : f x' ∈ (chartAt H' y).source) :
    MDiffAt[s] f x' ↔ ContinuousWithinAt f s x' ∧ DifferentiableWithinAt 𝕜 (↑(extChartAt I' y) ∘ f ∘ ↑(extChartAt I x).symm) ((extChartAt I x).target ∩ ↑(extChartAt I x).symm ⁻¹' (s ∩ f ⁻¹' (extChartAt I' y).source)) (↑(extChartAt I x) x')

    One can reformulate smoothness within a set at a point as continuity within this set at this point, and smoothness in any chart containing that point. Version requiring differentiability in the target instead of range I.

    source
    theorem mdifferentiableAt_iff_of_mem_source {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} [IsManifold I 1 M] [IsManifold I' 1 M'] {x' : M} {y : M'} (hx : x' ∈ (chartAt H x).source) (hy : f x' ∈ (chartAt H' y).source) :
    MDiffAt f x' ↔ ContinuousAt f x' ∧ DifferentiableWithinAt 𝕜 (↑(extChartAt I' y) ∘ f ∘ ↑(extChartAt I x).symm) (Set.range ↑I) (↑(extChartAt I x) x')
    source
    theorem mdifferentiableOn_iff_of_mem_maximalAtlas {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {s : Set M} {e : OpenPartialHomeomorph M H} {e' : OpenPartialHomeomorph M' H'} (he : e ∈ IsManifold.maximalAtlas I 1 M) (he' : e' ∈ IsManifold.maximalAtlas I' 1 M') (hs : s ⊆ e.source) (h2s : Set.MapsTo f s e'.source) :
    MDiff[s] f ↔ ContinuousOn f s ∧ DifferentiableOn 𝕜 (↑(e'.extend I') ∘ f ∘ ↑(e.extend I).symm) (↑(e.extend I) '' s)
    source
    theorem mdifferentiableOn_iff_of_mem_maximalAtlas' {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {s : Set M} {e : OpenPartialHomeomorph M H} {e' : OpenPartialHomeomorph M' H'} (he : e ∈ IsManifold.maximalAtlas I 1 M) (he' : e' ∈ IsManifold.maximalAtlas I' 1 M') (hs : s ⊆ e.source) (h2s : Set.MapsTo f s e'.source) :
    MDiff[s] f ↔ DifferentiableOn 𝕜 (↑(e'.extend I') ∘ f ∘ ↑(e.extend I).symm) (↑(e.extend I) '' s)

    Differentiability on a set is equivalent to differentiability in the extended charts.

    source
    theorem mdifferentiableOn_iff_of_subset_source {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {s : Set M} [IsManifold I 1 M] [IsManifold I' 1 M'] {x : M} {y : M'} (hs : s ⊆ (chartAt H x).source) (h2s : Set.MapsTo f s (chartAt H' y).source) :
    MDiff[s] f ↔ ContinuousOn f s ∧ DifferentiableOn 𝕜 (↑(extChartAt I' y) ∘ f ∘ ↑(extChartAt I x).symm) (↑(extChartAt I x) '' s)

    If the set where you want f to be smooth lies entirely in a single chart, and f maps it into a single chart, the smoothness of f on that set can be expressed by purely looking in these charts. Note: this lemma uses extChartAt I x '' s instead of (extChartAt I x).symm ⁻¹' s to ensure that this set lies in (extChartAt I x).target.

    source
    theorem mdifferentiableOn_iff_of_subset_source' {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {s : Set M} [IsManifold I 1 M] [IsManifold I' 1 M'] {x : M} {y : M'} (hs : s ⊆ (extChartAt I x).source) (h2s : Set.MapsTo f s (extChartAt I' y).source) :
    MDiff[s] f ↔ DifferentiableOn 𝕜 (↑(extChartAt I' y) ∘ f ∘ ↑(extChartAt I x).symm) (↑(extChartAt I x) '' s)

    If the set where you want f to be smooth lies entirely in a single chart, and f maps it into a single chart, the smoothness of f on that set can be expressed by purely looking in these charts. Note: this lemma uses extChartAt I x '' s instead of (extChartAt I x).symm ⁻¹' s to ensure that this set lies in (extChartAt I x).target.

    source
    theorem mdifferentiableOn_iff {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {s : Set M} [IsManifold I 1 M] [IsManifold I' 1 M'] :
    MDiff[s] f ↔ ContinuousOn f s ∧ ∀ (x : M) (y : M'), DifferentiableOn 𝕜 (↑(extChartAt I' y) ∘ f ∘ ↑(extChartAt I x).symm) ((extChartAt I x).target ∩ ↑(extChartAt I x).symm ⁻¹' (s ∩ f ⁻¹' (extChartAt I' y).source))

    One can reformulate smoothness on a set as continuity on this set, and smoothness in any extended chart.

    source
    theorem mdifferentiableOn_iff_target {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {s : Set M} [IsManifold I 1 M] [IsManifold I' 1 M'] :
    MDiff[s] f ↔ ContinuousOn f s ∧ ∀ (y : M'), MDiff[s ∩ f ⁻¹' (extChartAt I' y).source] (↑(extChartAt I' y) ∘ f)

    One can reformulate smoothness on a set as continuity on this set, and smoothness in any extended chart in the target.

    source
    theorem mdifferentiable_iff {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} [IsManifold I 1 M] [IsManifold I' 1 M'] :
    MDiff f ↔ Continuous f ∧ ∀ (x : M) (y : M'), DifferentiableOn 𝕜 (↑(extChartAt I' y) ∘ f ∘ ↑(extChartAt I x).symm) ((extChartAt I x).target ∩ ↑(extChartAt I x).symm ⁻¹' f ⁻¹' (extChartAt I' y).source)

    One can reformulate smoothness as continuity and smoothness in any extended chart.

    source
    theorem mdifferentiable_iff_target {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} [IsManifold I 1 M] [IsManifold I' 1 M'] :
    MDiff f ↔ Continuous f ∧ ∀ (y : M'), MDiff[f ⁻¹' (extChartAt I' y).source] (↑(extChartAt I' y) ∘ f)

    One can reformulate smoothness as continuity and smoothness in any extended chart in the target.

    Deducing differentiability from smoothness #

    source
    theorem ContMDiffWithinAt.mdifferentiableWithinAt {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} {s : Set M} {n : WithTop ℕ∞} (hf : ContMDiffWithinAt I I' n f s x) (hn : n ≠ 0) :
    MDiffAt[s] f x
    source
    theorem ContMDiffAt.mdifferentiableAt {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} {n : WithTop ℕ∞} (hf : ContMDiffAt I I' n f x) (hn : n ≠ 0) :
    MDiffAt f x
    source
    theorem ContMDiff.mdifferentiableAt {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} {n : WithTop ℕ∞} (hf : ContMDiff I I' n f) (hn : n ≠ 0) :
    MDiffAt f x
    source
    theorem ContMDiff.mdifferentiableWithinAt {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} {s : Set M} {n : WithTop ℕ∞} (hf : ContMDiff I I' n f) (hn : n ≠ 0) :
    MDiffAt[s] f x
    source
    theorem ContMDiffOn.mdifferentiableOn {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {s : Set M} {n : WithTop ℕ∞} (hf : ContMDiffOn I I' n f s) (hn : n ≠ 0) :
    MDiff[s] f
    source
    theorem ContMDiff.mdifferentiable {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {n : WithTop ℕ∞} (hf : ContMDiff I I' n f) (hn : n ≠ 0) :
    MDiff f
    source
    theorem MDifferentiableOn.continuousOn {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {s : Set M} (h : MDiff[s] f) :
    ContinuousOn f s
    source
    theorem MDifferentiable.continuous {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} (h : MDiff f) :
    Continuous f

    Deriving continuity from differentiability on manifolds #

    source
    theorem writtenInExtChartAt_comp {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {E'' : Type u_8} [NormedAddCommGroup E''] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E''] {H'' : Type u_9} [TopologicalSpace H''] {I'' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E'' H''} {M'' : Type u_10} [TopologicalSpace M''] [ChartedSpace H'' M''] {f : M → M'} {x : M} {s : Set M} {g : M' → M''} (h : ContinuousWithinAt f s x) :
    writtenInExtChartAt I I'' x (g ∘ f) =ᶠ[nhdsWithin (↑(extChartAt I x) x) (↑(extChartAt I x).symm ⁻¹' s ∩ Set.range ↑I)] writtenInExtChartAt I' I'' (f x) g ∘ writtenInExtChartAt I I' x f
    source
    theorem UniqueMDiffWithinAt.eq {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} {s : Set M} {f' f₁' : TangentSpace I x →L[𝕜] TangentSpace I' (f x)} (U : UniqueMDiffAt[s] x) (h : HasMFDerivAt[s] f x f') (h₁ : HasMFDerivAt[s] f x f₁') :
    f' = f₁'

    UniqueMDiffWithinAt achieves its goal: it implies the uniqueness of the derivative.

    source
    theorem UniqueMDiffOn.eq {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} {s : Set M} {f' f₁' : TangentSpace I x →L[𝕜] TangentSpace I' (f x)} (U : UniqueMDiff[s]) (hx : x ∈ s) (h : HasMFDerivAt[s] f x f') (h₁ : HasMFDerivAt[s] f x f₁') :
    f' = f₁'

    General lemmas on derivatives of functions between manifolds #

    We mimic the API for functions between vector spaces

    source
    @[simp]
    theorem mfderivWithin_univ {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} :
    mfderiv[Set.univ] f = mfderiv% f
    source
    theorem mfderivWithin_zero_of_not_mdifferentiableWithinAt {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} {s : Set M} (h : ¬MDiffAt[s] f x) :
    mfderiv[s] f x = 0
    source
    theorem mfderiv_zero_of_not_mdifferentiableAt {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} (h : ¬MDiffAt f x) :
    mfderiv% f x = 0
    source
    theorem mdifferentiable_of_subsingleton {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} [Subsingleton E] :
    MDiff f
    source
    theorem mdifferentiableWithinAt_of_subsingleton {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} {s : Set M} [Subsingleton E] :
    MDiffAt[s] f x
    source
    theorem mdifferentiableWithinAt_of_mfderivWithin_injective {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} {s : Set M} (hf : Function.Injective ⇑(mfderiv[s] f x)) :
    MDiffAt[s] f x

    If f : M → M' has injective differential at x within s, it is MDifferentiable at x within s.

    source
    theorem mdifferentiableAt_of_mfderiv_injective {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {x : M} {f : M → M'} (hf : Function.Injective ⇑(mfderiv% f x)) :
    MDiffAt f x

    If f : M → M' has injective differential at x, it is MDifferentiable at x.

    source
    theorem mdifferentiableWithinAt_of_isInvertible_mfderivWithin {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} {s : Set M} (hf : (mfderiv[s] f x).IsInvertible) :
    MDiffAt[s] f x
    source
    theorem mdifferentiableAt_of_isInvertible_mfderiv {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} (hf : (mfderiv% f x).IsInvertible) :
    MDiffAt f x
    source
    theorem HasMFDerivWithinAt.mono {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} {s t : Set M} {f' : TangentSpace I x →L[𝕜] TangentSpace I' (f x)} (h : HasMFDerivAt[t] f x f') (hst : s ⊆ t) :
    HasMFDerivAt[s] f x f'
    source
    theorem HasMFDerivAt.hasMFDerivWithinAt {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} {s : Set M} {f' : TangentSpace I x →L[𝕜] TangentSpace I' (f x)} (h : HasMFDerivAt% f x f') :
    HasMFDerivAt[s] f x f'
    source
    theorem HasMFDerivWithinAt.mdifferentiableWithinAt {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} {s : Set M} {f' : TangentSpace I x →L[𝕜] TangentSpace I' (f x)} (h : HasMFDerivAt[s] f x f') :
    MDiffAt[s] f x
    source
    theorem HasMFDerivAt.mdifferentiableAt {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} {f' : TangentSpace I x →L[𝕜] TangentSpace I' (f x)} (h : HasMFDerivAt% f x f') :
    MDiffAt f x
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem hasMFDerivWithinAt_univ {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} {f' : TangentSpace I x →L[𝕜] TangentSpace I' (f x)} :
    HasMFDerivAt[Set.univ] f x f' ↔ HasMFDerivAt% f x f'
    source
    theorem hasMFDerivAt_unique {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} {f₀' f₁' : TangentSpace I x →L[𝕜] TangentSpace I' (f x)} (h₀ : HasMFDerivAt% f x f₀') (h₁ : HasMFDerivAt% f x f₁') :
    f₀' = f₁'
    source
    theorem hasMFDerivWithinAt_inter' {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} {s t : Set M} {f' : TangentSpace I x →L[𝕜] TangentSpace I' (f x)} (h : t ∈ nhdsWithin x s) :
    HasMFDerivAt[s ∩ t] f x f' ↔ HasMFDerivAt[s] f x f'

    theorem MDifferentiableWithinAt.mfderivWithin {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} {s : Set M} (h : MDiffAt[s] f x) :
    mfderiv[s] f x = fderivWithin 𝕜 (writtenInExtChartAt I I' x f) (↑(extChartAt I x).symm ⁻¹' s ∩ Set.range ↑I) (↑(extChartAt I x) x)

    mfderiv% f x = fderivWithin 𝕜 (writtenInExtChartAt I I' x f) (Set.range ↑I) (↑(extChartAt I x) x)

    MDiffAt[insert y s] f x ↔ MDiffAt[s] f x
    source
    theorem MDifferentiableWithinAt.insert' {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} {s : Set M} {y : M} :
    MDiffAt[s] f x → MDiffAt[insert y s] f x

    Alias of the reverse direction of mdifferentiableWithinAt_insert.

    source
    theorem MDifferentiableWithinAt.of_insert {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} {s : Set M} {y : M} :
    MDiffAt[insert y s] f x → MDiffAt[s] f x

    Alias of the forward direction of mdifferentiableWithinAt_insert.

    source
    theorem MDifferentiableWithinAt.insert {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} {s : Set M} (h : MDiffAt[s] f x) :
    MDiffAt[insert x s] f x

    Being differentiable on a union of open sets can be tested on each set #

    source
    theorem MDifferentiableOn.union_of_isOpen {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {s t : Set M} (hf : MDiff[s] f) (hf' : MDiff[t] f) (hs : IsOpen s) (ht : IsOpen t) :
    MDiff[s ∪ t] f

    If a function is differentiable on two open sets, it is also differentiable on their union.

    source
    theorem mdifferentiableOn_union_iff_of_isOpen {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {s t : Set M} (hs : IsOpen s) (ht : IsOpen t) :
    MDiff[s ∪ t] f ↔ MDiff[s] f ∧ MDiff[t] f

    A function is differentiable on two open sets iff it is differentiable on their union.

    source
    theorem mdifferentiable_of_mdifferentiableOn_union_of_isOpen {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {s t : Set M} (hf : MDiff[s] f) (hf' : MDiff[t] f) (hst : s ∪ t = Set.univ) (hs : IsOpen s) (ht : IsOpen t) :
    MDiff f
    source
    theorem MDifferentiableOn.iUnion_of_isOpen {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {ι : Type u_11} {s : ι → Set M} (hf : ∀ (i : ι), MDiff[s i] f) (hs : ∀ (i : ι), IsOpen (s i)) :
    MDiff[⋃ (i : ι), s i] f

    If a function is differentiable on open sets s i, it is differentiable on their union.

    source
    theorem mdifferentiableOn_iUnion_iff_of_isOpen {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {ι : Type u_11} {s : ι → Set M} (hs : ∀ (i : ι), IsOpen (s i)) :
    MDiff[⋃ (i : ι), s i] f ↔ ∀ (i : ι), MDiff[s i] f

    A function is differentiable on a union of open sets s i iff it is differentiable on each s i.

    source
    theorem mdifferentiable_of_mdifferentiableOn_iUnion_of_isOpen {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {ι : Type u_11} {s : ι → Set M} (hf : ∀ (i : ι), MDiff[s i] f) (hs : ∀ (i : ι), IsOpen (s i)) (hs' : ⋃ (i : ι), s i = Set.univ) :
    MDiff f

    Deriving continuity from differentiability on manifolds #

    source
    theorem HasMFDerivWithinAt.continuousWithinAt {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} {s : Set M} {f' : TangentSpace I x →L[𝕜] TangentSpace I' (f x)} (h : HasMFDerivAt[s] f x f') :
    ContinuousWithinAt f s x
    source
    theorem HasMFDerivAt.continuousAt {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} {f' : TangentSpace I x →L[𝕜] TangentSpace I' (f x)} (h : HasMFDerivAt% f x f') :
    ContinuousAt f x
    source
    theorem tangentMapWithin_subset {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {s t : Set M} {p : TangentBundle I M} (st : s ⊆ t) (hs : UniqueMDiffAt[s] p.proj) (h : MDiffAt[t] f p.proj) :
    tangentMapWithin I I' f s p = tangentMapWithin I I' f t p
    source
    theorem tangentMapWithin_univ {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} :
    tangentMapWithin I I' f Set.univ = tangentMap I I' f
    source
    theorem tangentMapWithin_eq_tangentMap {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {s : Set M} {p : TangentBundle I M} (hs : UniqueMDiffAt[s] p.proj) (h : MDiffAt f p.proj) :
    tangentMapWithin I I' f s p = tangentMap I I' f p
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem tangentMapWithin_proj {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {s : Set M} {p : TangentBundle I M} :
    (tangentMapWithin I I' f s p).proj = f p.proj
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem tangentMapWithin_snd {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} {s : Set M} {X : TangentSpace I x} :
    (tangentMapWithin I I' f s ⟨x, X⟩).snd = (mfderiv[s] f x) X
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem tangentMap_proj {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {p : TangentBundle I M} :
    (tangentMap I I' f p).proj = f p.proj
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem tangentMap_snd {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} {X : TangentSpace I x} :
    (tangentMap I I' f ⟨x, X⟩).snd = (mfderiv% f x) X
    source
    theorem preimage_extChartAt_eventuallyEq_compl_singleton {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {x : M} {s t : Set M} (y : M) (h : s =ᶠ[nhdsWithin x {y}ᶜ] t) :
    ↑(extChartAt I x).symm ⁻¹' s ∩ Set.range ↑I =ᶠ[nhdsWithin (↑(extChartAt I x) x) {↑(extChartAt I x) x}ᶜ] ↑(extChartAt I x).symm ⁻¹' t ∩ Set.range ↑I

    If two sets coincide locally around x, except maybe at a point y, then their preimage under extChartAt x coincide locally, except maybe at extChartAt I x x.

    Congruence lemmas for derivatives on manifolds #

    source
    theorem hasMFDerivWithinAt_congr_set' {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} {s t : Set M} {f' : TangentSpace I x →L[𝕜] TangentSpace I' (f x)} (y : M) (h : s =ᶠ[nhdsWithin x {y}ᶜ] t) :
    HasMFDerivAt[s] f x f' ↔ HasMFDerivAt[t] f x f'

    If two sets coincide locally, except maybe at a point, then it is equivalent to have a manifold derivative within one or the other.

    source
    theorem hasMFDerivWithinAt_congr_set {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} {s t : Set M} {f' : TangentSpace I x →L[𝕜] TangentSpace I' (f x)} (h : s =ᶠ[nhds x] t) :
    HasMFDerivAt[s] f x f' ↔ HasMFDerivAt[t] f x f'
    source
    theorem mdifferentiableWithinAt_congr_set' {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} {s t : Set M} (y : M) (h : s =ᶠ[nhdsWithin x {y}ᶜ] t) :
    MDiffAt[s] f x ↔ MDiffAt[t] f x

    If two sets coincide around a point (except possibly at a single point y), then it is equivalent to be differentiable within one or the other set.

    source
    theorem mdifferentiableWithinAt_congr_set {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} {s t : Set M} (h : s =ᶠ[nhds x] t) :
    MDiffAt[s] f x ↔ MDiffAt[t] f x
    source
    theorem mfderivWithin_congr_set' {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} {s t : Set M} (y : M) (h : s =ᶠ[nhdsWithin x {y}ᶜ] t) :
    mfderiv[s] f x = mfderiv[t] f x

    If two sets coincide locally, except maybe at a point, then derivatives within these sets are the same.

    source
    theorem mfderivWithin_congr_set {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} {s t : Set M} (h : s =ᶠ[nhds x] t) :
    mfderiv[s] f x = mfderiv[t] f x

    If two sets coincide locally, then derivatives within these sets are the same.

    source
    theorem mfderivWithin_eventually_congr_set' {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} {s t : Set M} (y : M) (h : s =ᶠ[nhdsWithin x {y}ᶜ] t) :
    ∀ᶠ (y : M) in nhds x, mfderiv[s] f y = mfderiv[t] f y

    If two sets coincide locally, except maybe at a point, then derivatives within these sets coincide locally.

    source
    theorem mfderivWithin_eventually_congr_set {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} {s t : Set M} (h : s =ᶠ[nhds x] t) :
    ∀ᶠ (y : M) in nhds x, mfderiv[s] f y = mfderiv[t] f y

    If two sets coincide locally, then derivatives within these sets coincide locally.

    source
    theorem HasMFDerivAt.congr_mfderiv {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} {f' f₁' : TangentSpace I x →L[𝕜] TangentSpace I' (f x)} (h : HasMFDerivAt% f x f') (h' : f' = f₁') :
    HasMFDerivAt% f x f₁'
    source
    theorem HasMFDerivWithinAt.congr_mfderiv {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} {s : Set M} {f' f₁' : TangentSpace I x →L[𝕜] TangentSpace I' (f x)} (h : HasMFDerivAt[s] f x f') (h' : f' = f₁') :

    Version of MDifferentiableWithinAt.congr where x need not be contained in s, but f and f₁ are equal on a set containing both.

    tangentMapWithin I I' f s p = tangentMapWithin I I' f₁ s p

    mfderiv% f₁ x = mfderiv% f x

    theorem mfderiv_congr_point {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x x' : M} (h : x = x') :
    mfderiv% f x = mfderiv% f x'

    A congruence lemma for mfderiv, (ab)using the fact that TangentSpace I' (f x) is definitionally equal to E'.

    source
    theorem mfderiv_congr {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {f : M → M'} {x : M} {f' : M → M'} (h : f = f') :
    mfderiv% f x = mfderiv% f' x

    A congruence lemma for mfderiv, (ab)using the fact that TangentSpace I' (f x) is definitionally equal to E'.

    Composition lemmas #

    theorem HasMFDerivWithinAt.comp {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {E'' : Type u_8} [NormedAddCommGroup E''] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E''] {H'' : Type u_9} [TopologicalSpace H''] {I'' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E'' H''} {M'' : Type u_10} [TopologicalSpace M''] [ChartedSpace H'' M''] {f : M → M'} (x : M) {s : Set M} {g : M' → M''} {u : Set M'} {f' : TangentSpace I x →L[𝕜] TangentSpace I' (f x)} {g' : TangentSpace I' (f x) →L[𝕜] TangentSpace I'' (g (f x))} (hg : HasMFDerivAt[u] g (f x) g') (hf : HasMFDerivAt[s] f x f') (hst : s ⊆ f ⁻¹' u) :
    HasMFDerivAt[s] (g ∘ f) x (g' ∘SL f')

    theorem HasMFDerivAt.comp {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {E'' : Type u_8} [NormedAddCommGroup E''] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E''] {H'' : Type u_9} [TopologicalSpace H''] {I'' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E'' H''} {M'' : Type u_10} [TopologicalSpace M''] [ChartedSpace H'' M''] {f : M → M'} (x : M) {g : M' → M''} {f' : TangentSpace I x →L[𝕜] TangentSpace I' (f x)} {g' : TangentSpace I' (f x) →L[𝕜] TangentSpace I'' (g (f x))} (hg : HasMFDerivAt% g (f x) g') (hf : HasMFDerivAt% f x f') :
    HasMFDerivAt% (g ∘ f) x (g' ∘SL f')

    The chain rule for manifolds.

    mfderiv% (g ∘ f) x = mfderiv% g (f x) ∘SL mfderiv% f x
    source
    theorem mfderiv_comp_of_eq {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {E'' : Type u_8} [NormedAddCommGroup E''] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E''] {H'' : Type u_9} [TopologicalSpace H''] {I'' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E'' H''} {M'' : Type u_10} [TopologicalSpace M''] [ChartedSpace H'' M''] {f : M → M'} {g : M' → M''} {x : M} {y : M'} (hg : MDiffAt g y) (hf : MDiffAt f x) (hy : f x = y) :
    mfderiv% (g ∘ f) x = mfderiv% g (f x) ∘SL mfderiv% f x
    source
    theorem mfderiv_comp_apply {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {E'' : Type u_8} [NormedAddCommGroup E''] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E''] {H'' : Type u_9} [TopologicalSpace H''] {I'' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E'' H''} {M'' : Type u_10} [TopologicalSpace M''] [ChartedSpace H'' M''] {f : M → M'} (x : M) {g : M' → M''} (hg : MDiffAt g (f x)) (hf : MDiffAt f x) (v : TangentSpace I x) :
    (mfderiv% (g ∘ f) x) v = (mfderiv% g (f x)) ((mfderiv% f x) v)
    source
    theorem mfderiv_comp_apply_of_eq {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {E'' : Type u_8} [NormedAddCommGroup E''] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E''] {H'' : Type u_9} [TopologicalSpace H''] {I'' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E'' H''} {M'' : Type u_10} [TopologicalSpace M''] [ChartedSpace H'' M''] {f : M → M'} (x : M) {g : M' → M''} {y : M'} (hg : MDiffAt g y) (hf : MDiffAt f x) (hy : f x = y) (v : TangentSpace I x) :
    (mfderiv% (g ∘ f) x) v = (mfderiv% g y) ((mfderiv% f x) v)
    source

    MDiff[s] (g ∘ f)
    source

    theorem MDifferentiable.comp {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {E'' : Type u_8} [NormedAddCommGroup E''] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E''] {H'' : Type u_9} [TopologicalSpace H''] {I'' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E'' H''} {M'' : Type u_10} [TopologicalSpace M''] [ChartedSpace H'' M''] {f : M → M'} {g : M' → M''} (hg : MDiff g) (hf : MDiff f) :
    MDiff (g ∘ f)

    theorem tangentMapWithin_comp_at {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {E'' : Type u_8} [NormedAddCommGroup E''] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E''] {H'' : Type u_9} [TopologicalSpace H''] {I'' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E'' H''} {M'' : Type u_10} [TopologicalSpace M''] [ChartedSpace H'' M''] {f : M → M'} {s : Set M} {g : M' → M''} {u : Set M'} (p : TangentBundle I M) (hg : MDiffAt[u] g (f p.proj)) (hf : MDiffAt[s] f p.proj) (h : s ⊆ f ⁻¹' u) (hps : UniqueMDiffAt[s] p.proj) :
    tangentMapWithin I I'' (g ∘ f) s p = tangentMapWithin I' I'' g u (tangentMapWithin I I' f s p)
    source
    theorem tangentMap_comp_at {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {E'' : Type u_8} [NormedAddCommGroup E''] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E''] {H'' : Type u_9} [TopologicalSpace H''] {I'' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E'' H''} {M'' : Type u_10} [TopologicalSpace M''] [ChartedSpace H'' M''] {f : M → M'} {g : M' → M''} (p : TangentBundle I M) (hg : MDiffAt g (f p.proj)) (hf : MDiffAt f p.proj) :
    tangentMap I I'' (g ∘ f) p = tangentMap I' I'' g (tangentMap I I' f p)
    source
    theorem tangentMap_comp {𝕜 : Type u_1} [NontriviallyNormedField 𝕜] {E : Type u_2} [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E] {H : Type u_3} [TopologicalSpace H] {I : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E H} {M : Type u_4} [TopologicalSpace M] [ChartedSpace H M] {E' : Type u_5} [NormedAddCommGroup E'] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E'] {H' : Type u_6} [TopologicalSpace H'] {I' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E' H'} {M' : Type u_7} [TopologicalSpace M'] [ChartedSpace H' M'] {E'' : Type u_8} [NormedAddCommGroup E''] [NormedSpace 𝕜 E''] {H'' : Type u_9} [TopologicalSpace H''] {I'' : ModelWithCorners 𝕜 E'' H''} {M'' : Type u_10} [TopologicalSpace M''] [ChartedSpace H'' M''] {f : M → M'} {g : M' → M''} (hg : MDiff g) (hf : MDiff f) :
    tangentMap I I'' (g ∘ f) = tangentMap I' I'' g ∘ tangentMap I I' f
